title: Docs & a hub for building xNet in any language
summary: New Languages & SDKs docs (Swift's XNetKit, Rust's xnet-core, and a maturity matrix), a /build-with marketing hub, a footer link, and cross-links across the site — so the native Swift/Rust implementations and the Vue/Svelte/Solid adapters are finally discoverable, each with an honest maturity badge.
